transcript: Speaker A: Kindly introduce yourself. Speaker B (Before): Myself Riya. Uh, I am from Delhi. I have done graduation and I am hardworking. That's all. Speaker B (Now): Hi, I'm Riya from Delhi. I've recently completed my graduation and I enjoy working in fast-paced environments where I can learn quickly and contribute. Speaker A: Why should we hire you? Speaker B (Before): I am very mehnati. I will give my 100%. Please give me chance. Speaker B (Now): I'm a quick learner, I adapt fast, and I believe I can bring value to a team while continuously improving myself. Speaker B: देखा मेरा इम्प्रूवमेंट? मैं सेम हूँ बस बोलना सीख गयी। पहले आंसर्स दिमाग में आते थे, बस वर्ड्स नहीं निकलते थे। कॉन्फिडेंस नहीं था। फिर मैंने SpeakX के बारे में जाना, जिसमें AI टीचर है जो 24/7 अवेलेबल रहती है। उसके साथ मैंने इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस की और मेरा जितना भी गलती होता था, वो मुझे बिना जज करे सिखाती थी। धीरे-धीरे फ्लो और कॉन्फिडेंस दोनों आ गया। अभी मुझसे कोई भी इंग्लिश में पूछे, मैं फुल कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ रिप्लाई कर पाती हूँ। तो अगर आप भी ऐसी प्रॉब्लम्स फेस करते हो, तो SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड करो और ट्रायल लेके इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू करो। डाउनलोड द ऐप नाउ। [Did you see my improvement? I am the same, I just learned how to speak. Earlier, answers used to come to my mind, but words wouldn't come out. There was no confidence. Then I learned about SpeakX, which has an AI teacher available 24/7. I practiced speaking English with her, and whatever mistakes I made, she would teach me without judging. Gradually, both flow and confidence came. Now, if anyone asks me anything in English, I can reply with full confidence. So if you also face such problems, download the SpeakX app and start speaking English by taking a trial. Download the app now.]
on_screen_text: BEFORE / NOW / Kindly introduce yourself / Myself Riya / I am from Delhi / I have done graduation / and I am hardworking / That's all / Hi, I'm Riya / from Delhi / completed my graduation / and I enjoy working / in fast paced environment / where I can learn quickly / and contribute / Why should we hire you? / I am very mehnati / I will give my 100% / Please give me chance / I'm a quick learner / I adapt fast and I / believe I can bring / value to a team / while continuously / improving myself / Dekha mera improvement? / SpeakX / Milein SIA se Aapki Personal AI teacher / Listen and select. / Hello friend! / Hello me! / AMAZING! / Hello ________! / AWESOME! / Dheere dheere / confidence / reply kar pati hoon / problems / SpeakX app / English bolna / Download on the App Store / GET IT ON Google Play
summary: The ad compares a job candidate's hesitant, broken English interview performance with her confident, fluent responses after using SpeakX. She explains how the app's non-judgmental AI teacher helped her overcome the barrier of knowing English but freezing when speaking. Viewers are encouraged to download the app and start a trial.
